title: salsola hortensis
intro: Salsola hortensis, also known as prickly saltwort or Russian thistle, is a perennial plant native to Europe and Asia, characterized by its prickly stems and salt-tolerant properties. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Salsola hortensis include its ability to reduce swelling, alleviate digestive issues, and help manage blood pressure. Salsola hortensis can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
